name: Chickpea Salad
recipeIngredient: or ¼ teaspoon Hot pepper flakes;
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chickpeas and drain them.
2. Place the drained chickpeas in a bowl.
3. Add the chopped celery and green onions to the bowl.
4. Combine the minced garlic, hot pepper flakes (or to taste), and tahini dressing.
5. Pour the mixture over the chickpeas and toss gently.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 LOW-FAT MEAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 129; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 2g; PRO: 7g; SOD: 320mg; FAT: 3g.
